# Jai Jagdamba Interior

> Premium interior materials atelier specializing in PVC panels, UV rolls & wallpapers, and PU stone for luxury interiors.

Jai Jagdamba Interior is a curated brand of architectural surfaces crafted for architects, designers, and homeowners. Owned by Yash Bisnaliya, based in Gujarat, India. Contact: +91 95481 84893.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, product showcase, texture studio, gallery, and contact.
